Motion For Order Vacating Sanctions Imposed On Feb. 4, 2009 And Declaration Of Elizabeth A. Macdonld In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff National Credit Acceptance's Motion for Order Vacating Sanctions imposed on 2/4/2009 issued to John J. Pugh in the amount of $250.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed in open court. Proceedings reported by: Arlene Howell, CSR# 2542. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Continued To May-06-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/06/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162 (212)
